programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Ducks face the Oilers in Game 2 of the West first round at Rogers Place. Edmonton won the opener 7-4 on Jan. 26, fueled by its power play. Connor McDavid leads the Oilers while Cutter Gauthier leads the Ducks. Anaheim looks to even the series.

programme.title: The National
programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism; Adrienne Arsenault and Ian Hanomansing anchor.

programme.title: Live: CBC Toronto News at 11
programme.desc: The host presents information about the social, economic and political issues of the day and provides updates on current events in Toronto.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ben's situation forces Tim to question his past, and Gary sends Theo packing.

programme.title: Land and Sea
programme.desc: Keeping rare purebred poultry thriving; we'll follow Nova Scotians to the biggest purebred poultry show in Canada.

programme.title: Diggstown
programme.desc: Marcie takes on the case of a dismissed police officer who killed a local woman during a high-speed chase through the streets of North Preston; Pam fights for a single mother charged with prostitution and fraud.

programme.title: The National
programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism; Adrienne Arsenault and Ian Hanomansing anchor.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Seeking a less hectic lifestyle in Yorkshire, a London couple have £425,000 to spend on a new home; Steve Brown is on hand to help them find it.

programme.title: Live: World Report
programme.desc: What's going on in Canada and the world; a ten-minute dose of big news stories.

programme.title: Live: Metro Morning
programme.desc: News, current affairs, weather and traffic.

programme.desc: Mini-Maple and Q have to convince a stuffed toy to play with them.

programme.desc: Jon and Maple must pick up the pieces so that Horus and Cassandra can make peace.

programme.title: Kingdom Force
programme.desc: Artie decides to take drastic measures to beat Jabari at his own game and stop his bragging.

programme.desc: When Ol' Bessie injures herself, Uncle Jack and Min venture through underwater caves to locate a special flower that's known to have a calming effect.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Lightning face the Canadiens in Game 3 at Bell Centre. After Josh Anderson gave Montreal a 2-1 lead, Nikita Kucherov tied it at 12:33 of the third to force OT. J.J. Moser scored at 12:48 into OT to seal the Lightning's win in Game 2.
